raw_response_text:
<features>
- observable feature: flower has a trumpet-shaped bloom
- observable feature: flower has a distinct color gradient from center to edge
- observable feature: flower is surrounded by green leaves
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has a trumpet-shaped bloom AND flower has a distinct color gradient from center to edge AND flower is surrounded by green leaves] THEN [75]
- IF [flower has multiple petals arranged in a flat, spreading pattern AND flower has a central labellum with contrasting color] THEN [35]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires for the Query Image because the flower clearly exhibits a trumpet-shaped bloom, a distinct color gradient from center to edge (white center fading to pink), and is surrounded by green leaves, which are all features consistent with class 75.
</rule_check>

<response>75</response>

<features>
- observable feature: flower has multiple petals with ruffled edges
- observable feature: center of flower has a distinct purple and yellow pattern
- observable feature: background contains green leaves and a blurred indoor setting
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has multiple petals with ruffled edges AND center has purple and yellow pattern] THEN [35]
- IF [flower has a trumpet-shaped bloom with smooth edges AND single color gradient] THEN [75]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the flower in the Query Image has multiple petals with ruffled edges and a center with a distinct purple and yellow pattern, matching the features of class 35.
</rule_check>
<response>35</response>
